query: INSERT INTO users (openId, email, name, loginMethod, role, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn) VALUES ('test-user-123', 'testuser@example.com', 'Test User', 'test', 'user', NOW(), NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE lastSignedIn = NOW();
